market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Crypto Long & Short: How the GENIUS Act repriced bitcoin's monetary premium
articles.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, Ravi Tanuku on why the GENIUS Act didn't just regulate stablecoins, it repriced Bitcoin's monetary premium. Then, Jesper Johansen on why looped ETH staking no longer needs a lending market.

articles.title: AI coding startup Cognition raises $1B at $25B pre-money valuation
articles.description: As Cognition reaches $492 in annualized revenue run rate, it more than doubled its valuation in eight months, it says.

articles.title: BIS project finds tokenization could make cross-border payments faster, safer
articles.description: Project Agorá, backed by major central banks, will now move toward "real-value" testing to settle tokenized central bank money and bank deposits on blockchain rails.

articles.title: Crypto IPOs could create massive $1 trillion market amid tokenization wave, Jefferies says
articles.description: The Wall Street investment bank expects a wave of crypto and blockchain public listings over the next two years as institutional investors shift their focus from speculative trading to real-world financial infrastructure.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: FAA orders SpaceX to investigate Starship V3 booster failure
articles.description: Starship is grounded until SpaceX finds out why the first V3 booster failed during its first test flight.

articles.title: StakeDAO exploit creates 5.4 trillion vsdCRV but nets only $91K
articles.description: PeckShield said the attacker bridged 43.7 ETH to Ethereum after minting trillions of vsdCRV, while EmberCN said most of the remaining tokens had insufficient liquidity to sell.

articles.title: HTX denies UK sanctions allegations as new data flags $7.6B Russia-linked flows
articles.description: UK sanctions Huobi Global S.A., operator of HTX, over alleged role in Russia’s “A7” shadow network, as new analysis claims the exchange handled billions in high‑risk flows.

articles.title: Banca Sella gets MiCA clearance for crypto services in Italy
articles.description: The bank plans to launch digital asset custody, transfer and receipt services in 2026 for selected customer categories.

articles.title: 直擊「失敗的太陽爆發」，物質硬生生被吸回表面
articles.description: 太陽爆發不一定都能成功把物質拋向太空。天文學家最近利用多部太陽望遠鏡，同時觀測到一次「失敗的太陽爆發」事件。  […]

articles.title: Block kicks off Cash App’s phased stablecoin roll out to its nearly 60 million users
articles.description: An individual familiar with the matter told CoinDesk the stablecoin feature was rolled out to 25% of users already and by the end of the week, all users will have access.

articles.title: Bitcoin price shrugs off $1.3B BlackRock ETF block sale
articles.description: Bitcoin’s price stayed firm despite a massive $1.3 billion block sale executed by a mysterious BlackRock ETF holder, which analysts called a sign of large-scale institutional de-risking.

articles.title: A bipartisan bridge to the future: Why the Senate must finish the job on digital Assets
articles.description: The Clarity Act’s recent markup proved that the momentum for regulation is there. It is imperative that Congress move the bill forward to establish rules this generation needs and a framework the next will inherit, urges Kim.

articles.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close today: Nominate a founder or submit your startup
articles.description: Today is the final day to apply or nominate a startup for Startup Battlefield 200. Once the clock strikes 11:59 p.m. PT, the window closes on your chance to compete for $100,000 in equity-free funding, gain global visibility, connect directly with investors, and launch on the TechCrunch Disrupt stag

articles.title: Sold in May and went away? Bitcoin risks another 10% drop as month turns red
articles.description: Bitcoin is on track to end May in the red, a historically bearish signal that could point to deeper losses ahead if the post-May track record is any guide.

articles.title: Robinhood is letting AI trade for you so you don't have to keep checking the markets
articles.description: Robinhood is bringing hedge fund-style automation to everyday investors by letting AI agents build portfolios, execute stock trades, and even go shopping using virtual credit cards.

articles.title: Aeternum brings the second edition of Unchained Summit to Vietnam on May 28-29
articles.description: Aeternum, organisers of the Unchained Summit series, will host the second edition of Unchained Summit Vietnam this week on May 28 and 29 at the Furama Resort in Da Nang.

articles.title: DTCC plans to bring tokenized assets to Stellar in latest Wall Street blockchain push
articles.description: The U.S. market infrastructure giant targets connecting tokenized stocks, ETFs and Treasuries to Stellar in the first half of 2027.

articles.title: Crypto’s biggest exchanges back push for token disclosure standards as industry courts institutional capital
articles.description: More than 40 crypto firms, including rival exchanges Coinbase and Kraken, are backing a Blockworks-led framework aimed at bringing stock market-style disclosures to token markets.

articles.title: SOND, a sleep tech startup from Bose’s former head of sleep, exits stealth with $7M
articles.description: SOND, a startup led by Bose’s former head of sleep products, emerged from stealth with $7M in funding for its AI-powered sleep earbuds.
